summary: PGlite SET TRANSACTION fails when adapter.transaction is called without behavior options
details: DatabaseAdapter SQLite adapter's transaction method passes {behavior: undefined} to PGlite's transaction, causing "SET TRANSACTION " syntax error. The coordination module calls adapter.transaction(fn) without options, which triggers this in the test environment. Fix: adapter.transaction should omit the behavior option when undefined, or always default to "deferred". Files affected: adapter.ts makeSQLiteAdapter transaction wrapper at line 128.
